name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: A standard mutual NDA for two parties to share confidential information with each other while restricting disclosure to third parties.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Mutual NDA, capturing party details, effective date, and governing law.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: A standard agreement for the purchase and use of cloud-hosted software services (SaaS), covering subscription terms, data handling, and support.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: An agreement for early-stage design partnerships where a vendor provides pre-release software in exchange for feedback and collaboration from the partner.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Defines the uptime commitments, incident response times, and remedies (service credits) a vendor provides for a cloud service.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Governs the delivery of professional or consulting services, including statements of work, fees, IP ownership, and warranties.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Establishes the rights and obligations of data controllers and processors under GDPR and other privacy regulations when personal data is processed on behalf of another party.

name: Software License Agreement
description: A standard license agreement for software products, covering grant of license, restrictions, fees, warranties, and liability limitations.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Formalizes a business partnership between two companies, covering referral or reseller arrangements, revenue sharing, and joint go-to-market activities.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: A short-term trial agreement allowing a prospective customer to evaluate a vendor's product or service under defined conditions before committing to a full contract.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Required under HIPAA, this agreement governs how a business associate may use and safeguard protected health information on behalf of a covered entity.

name: AI Addendum
description: An addendum to existing agreements that addresses the use of artificial intelligence tools, covering data use, output ownership, compliance obligations, and risk allocation.
